---
title: "HELICOPTER"
author: "a$ap rocky"
custom-field: "dan streit"
date: "2026-01-12"
categories: [music video, generative]
tags: [a$ap rocky, dan streit, gaussian splatting]
image: "thumbnail.jpg"
---

{{< video https://youtu.be/g1-46Nu3HxQ >}}

Music: A\$AP Rocky   
Video: A\$AP Rocky & Dan Streit
